title: Endhan Kan Munne Lyrics Nanban Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Endhan Kan Munne  || Singer: Alaapu Raju ||
Movie: Nanban ||  Music : Harris Jeyaraj || Lyrics: Karky


Endhan Kan Munney kan munney
kaanaamal poneney
Yaarum paarkaatha vinmeenaai
meenaai aaneyney

Idhayam kizhiyum oli kaetaen
Idhyaa !! idhyaa!! edhir paarthaen (2)

Mazhai kaetkiren, ennai erikiraai
Oli kaetkiren vizhigalai parikiraai
Kanavai kanavai kazhaithaaye
thodarndhida vidu vaaya?
Valigal valigal koduthaaye
urangida vidu vaaya?

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Endhan Kan Munne?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotions of a lover yearning for their beloved.

How does Endhan Kan Munne fit into the plot of Nanban?

This song captures a pivotal moment in the film where the protagonist reflects on love and relationships, enhancing the emotional narrative of the story.

Who is the singer of Endhan Kan Munne?

The song is sung by Aalap Raju, known for his expressive vocal style that perfectly complements the song's romantic theme.

Who composed the music for Endhan Kan Munne?

The music for this beautiful track was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, a prominent figure in the Tamil music industry.

When was Endhan Kan Munne released?

The song was released on December 19, 2011, as part of the Nanban soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Endhan Kan Munne, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions as he navigates the complexities of love. The song's romantic melody and poignant lyrics evoke a sense of longing and joy, making it a perfect fit for moments of celebration and reflection. As part of the film Nanban, it enhances the narrative by highlighting the emotional connections between characters. This track resonates with anyone who has experienced the beauty of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Endhan Kan Munne from Nanban is a mesmerizing romantic track that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Aalap Raju's soulful vocals and Harrish Jeyaraj's enchanting music, this song creates a captivating atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Dive into the emotional depth of this melody and experience the magic of Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: I went without seeing my eyes in front of me, no one could see me, like a fish in the sky.
I heard a sound that breaks the heart, oh! oh! I looked ahead.
I am listening to the rain, you are rising, I am listening to the sound, you are watching with your eyes. Is the dream, the dream, going to continue? Did you give me the paths to sleep?
